message:
test(demo_showcase): unit tests for core update/routing (bd-247o)

Added 14 new tests covering:

Routing and Navigation:
- navigate_changes_current_page
- navigate_to_same_page_is_noop
- navigate_via_appmsg

Global Toggles:
- toggle_sidebar_visibility
- show_help_overlay
- toggle_mouse_via_appmsg

Keybindings:
- key_q_triggers_quit
- key_question_shows_help
- key_escape_hides_help
- key_bracket_toggles_sidebar
- key_t_cycles_theme
- number_keys_navigate_pages

View State:
- view_shows_loading_when_not_ready
- keybindings_work_even_before_ready

All 42 app tests pass.
